description: Every Semrush Analytics + Projects feature, plus a local SQLite store and cross-domain joins no other Semrush tool has.

tools.name: account_balance
tools.description: Get remaining API units balance (free probe; no units cost). Returns the UnitsBalance.

tools.name: audit_campaign-info
tools.description: Get Site Audit campaign configuration and current status. Required: project_id. Returns the AuditCampaign.

tools.name: audit_edit
tools.description: Edit Site Audit campaign settings (page limit, user-agent, scope, etc.). Required: project_id. Optional: domain, scope, limit (plus 2 more). Returns the new AuditCampaign.

tools.name: audit_enable
tools.description: Enable Site Audit on a project. One-time per project. Free (config call). Required: project_id, domain. Optional: scope, limit, crawl_subdomains (plus 1 more). Returns the new AuditCampaign.

params.name: limit
params.description: Max pages to crawl per run

tools.name: audit_history
tools.description: Site Audit snapshots history (time series of issue counts and score). Required: project_id. Optional: limit (default: 30), offset. Returns array of AuditHistoryRow.

tools.name: audit_issue
tools.description: Detailed report for one issue in a snapshot (affected pages, status). Required: project_id, snapshot_id, issue_id. Optional: limit (default: 100), page, filter (plus 1 more). Returns the AuditIssueDetail.

tools.name: audit_issue-catalog
tools.description: Get text descriptions for all Site Audit issue codes. Free. Required: project_id. Returns array of AuditIssueDef.

tools.name: audit_page
tools.description: Get full details for one crawled page (issues found, status, metrics). Required: project_id, page_id. Returns the AuditPage.

tools.name: audit_page-by-url
tools.description: Look up the page_id for a given URL within a snapshot. Required: project_id, url. Optional: limit (default: 10). Returns array of AuditPageRef.

tools.name: audit_run
tools.description: Trigger a new Site Audit crawl. Free to launch; counts against page-credit pool. Required: project_id. Returns the new AuditRunResult.

tools.name: audit_snapshot-info
tools.description: Get aggregated counts for a snapshot (errors/warnings/notices, total checks). Required: project_id, snapshot_id. Returns the AuditSnapshot.

tools.name: audit_snapshots
tools.description: List Site Audit snapshots for a project. Free (no API units). Required: project_id. Returns array of AuditSnapshot.

tools.name: backlink_anchors
tools.description: Anchors. 40 units/line. Anchor texts used in backlinks pointing at a target. Required: type (default: backlinks_anchors), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of AnchorText.

tools.name: backlink_authority-score
tools.description: Authority Score profile. 40 units/request. Snapshot of Semrush Authority Score (AS) for a target. Required: type (default: backlinks_ascore_profile), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), export_columns. Returns the AuthorityScoreProfile.

tools.name: backlink_categories
tools.description: Categories. 40 units/line. Subject-matter categories of referring domains. Required: type (default: backlinks_categories), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 50), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of BacklinkCategory.

tools.name: backlink_categories-profile
tools.description: Categories profile. 40 units/request. Subject-matter categories of a target with confidence ratings. Required: type (default: backlinks_categories_profile), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 50), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of BacklinkCategory.

tools.name: backlink_compare-batch
tools.description: Batch Comparison. 40 units/request per domain. Side-by-side backlink stats for up to 200 domains. Required: type (default: backlinks_comparison), targets. Optional: target_types, export_columns. Returns array of BacklinksOverview.

tools.name: backlink_compare-refdomains
tools.description: Comparison by Referring Domains. 40 units/line. Which refdomains link to multiple targets (matrix). Required: type (default: backlinks_matrix), targets. Optional: target_types, limit (default: 100), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of ReferringDomain.

tools.name: backlink_competitors
tools.description: Backlink Competitors. 40 units/line. Domains with similar backlink profiles to the target. Required: type (default: backlinks_competitors), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 20), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of BacklinkCompetitor.

tools.name: backlink_geo
tools.description: Referring Domains by Country. 40 units/line. Country distribution of referring domains. Required: type (default: backlinks_geo), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 50), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of CountryDistribution.

tools.name: backlink_history
tools.description: Historical data (Backlinks). 40 units/line. Time series of backlink/refdomain counts and AS. Required: type (default: backlinks_historical), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 50), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of BacklinkHistoryRow.

tools.name: backlink_indexed-pages
tools.description: Indexed Pages. 40 units/line. Pages on the target receiving backlinks. Required: type (default: backlinks_pages), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of BacklinkedPage.

tools.name: backlink_list
tools.description: Backlinks. 40 units/line. Individual backlinks pointing at a target. Required: type (default: backlinks), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 3 more). Returns array of Backlink.

tools.name: backlink_overview
tools.description: Backlinks Overview. 40 units/request. Total backlinks, refdomains, refips, follow ratio, AS. Required: type (default: backlinks_overview), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), export_columns. Returns the BacklinksOverview.

tools.name: backlink_referring-domains
tools.description: Referring Domains. 40 units/line. Deduped domains linking to a target. Required: type (default: backlinks_refdomains), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 3 more). Returns array of ReferringDomain.

tools.name: backlink_referring-ips
tools.description: Referring IPs. 40 units/line. Deduped IP addresses hosting referring domains. Required: type (default: backlinks_refips), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of ReferringIP.

tools.name: backlink_tld
tools.description: TLD Distribution. 40 units/line. Distribution of referring domains by TLD. Required: type (default: backlinks_tld), target. Optional: target_type (default: root_domain), limit (default: 50), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of TLDDistribution.

tools.name: domain_ad-copies
tools.description: Domain Ads Copies. 20 units/line. Unique ad creatives a domain has run (title + description). Required: type (default: domain_adwords_unique), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 50), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of AdCopy.

params.name: export_columns
params.description: Columns (Tt=title, Ds=desc, Pc=keyword count, Un=ad id)

tools.name: domain_ad-history
tools.description: Domain Ad History. 100 units/line. 12-month archive of ad copies a domain ran for paid keywords. Required: type (default: domain_adwords_historical), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 50), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of AdHistoryRow.

tools.name: domain_compare
tools.description: Domain vs. Domain. 80 units/line. Side-by-side keyword overlap between 2-5 domains. Required: type (default: domain_domains), domains. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainCompareRow.

params.name: domains
params.description: Semrush 'domains' param string (e.g., '*|or|example.com|*|or|other.com'). The CLI command 'domain compare' wraps this.

params.name: export_columns
params.description: Columns (P0-P4 = position of each compared domain)

tools.name: domain_competitors-organic
tools.description: Competitors in Organic Search. 40 units/line. Domains sharing organic keywords with the target. Required: type (default: domain_organic_organic), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 20), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of DomainCompetitor.

tools.name: domain_competitors-paid
tools.description: Competitors in Paid Search. 40 units/line. Domains overlapping the target's Google Ads keyword set. Required: type (default: domain_adwords_adwords), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 20), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of DomainCompetitor.

tools.name: domain_competitors-pla
tools.description: PLA Competitors. 40 units/line. Domains overlapping the target's Google Shopping PLA keyword set. Required: type (default: domain_shopping_competitors), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 20), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainCompetitor.

tools.name: domain_organic-keywords
tools.description: Domain Organic Search Keywords. 30 units/line. Keywords a domain ranks for in Google's top 100 organic results. Required: type (default: domain_organic), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 4 more). Returns array of DomainOrganicKeyword.

params.name: filter
params.description: URL-encoded filter string (see Semrush filter syntax)

params.name: export_columns
params.description: Columns (Ph=phrase, Po=pos, Pp=prev pos, Pd=delta, Nq=volume, Tr=traffic %, Kd=difficulty)

tools.name: domain_organic-pages
tools.description: Domain Organic Pages. 30 units/line. Top organic landing pages on a domain by traffic. Required: type (default: domain_organic_pages), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of DomainOrganicPage.

params.name: export_columns
params.description: Columns (Ur=URL, Pc=keyword count, Tg=traffic, Tr=traffic %, Sr=SERP-feature positions, St=SERP-feature traffic)

tools.name: domain_overview
tools.description: Domain Overview (one database). 10 units/line. Live or historical rankings in one regional database. Required: type (default: domain_rank), domain. Optional: database (default: us), date, export_columns (default: Dn,Rk,Or,Ot,Oc,Ad,At,Ac). Returns the DomainOverview.

params.name: database
params.description: Database/country code (us, uk, ca, au, de, fr, es, it, br, in, ...)

params.name: date
params.description: Snapshot date in YYYYMM15 format (omit for current)

params.name: export_columns
params.description: Columns (Dn=domain, Rk=rank, Or=organic kws, Ot=organic traffic, Oc=organic cost, Ad/At/Ac=paid)

tools.name: domain_overview-all
tools.description: Domain Overview (all databases). 10 units/line. ~140 lines covering every regional database. Required: type (default: domain_ranks), domain. Optional: limit (default: 200), offset, date (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainOverview.

tools.name: domain_overview-history
tools.description: Domain Overview (history). 10 units/line. Monthly historical rankings for one database (back to 2012-2016). Required: type (default: domain_rank_history), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 24), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of DomainRankHistoryRow.

params.name: daily
params.description: Set to 1 for daily rather than monthly history (last 31 days)

tools.name: domain_paid-keywords
tools.description: Domain Paid Search Keywords. 30 units/line. Keywords a domain buys in Google Ads. Required: type (default: domain_adwords), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 4 more). Returns array of DomainPaidKeyword.

params.name: export_columns
params.description: Columns (Ab=ad block, Tt=ad title, Ds=ad description, Vu=visible URL)

tools.name: domain_pla-copies
tools.description: Domain PLA Copies. 20 units/line. Unique PLA ad creatives (title, price, shop). Required: type (default: domain_shopping_unique), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 50), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of PLACopy.

tools.name: domain_pla-keywords
tools.description: Domain PLA Search Keywords. 30 units/line. Google Shopping PLA keywords for a domain. Required: type (default: domain_shopping), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of PLAKeyword.

tools.name: domain_subdomains
tools.description: Domain Organic Subdomains. 30 units/line. Subdomains of a domain ranked by organic traffic. Required: type (default: domain_organic_subdomains), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainOrganicPage.

tools.name: keyword_ads-history
tools.description: Keyword Ads History. 100 units/line. 12-month archive of advertisers who bid on the keyword. Required: type (default: phrase_adwords_historical), phrase. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 50), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of AdHistoryRow.

tools.name: keyword_batch
tools.description: Batch Keyword Overview. 10 units/line. Up to 100 keywords in one call. Required: type (default: phrase_these), phrase. Optional: database (default: us), export_columns (default: Ph,Nq,Cp,Co,Nr,Td,In). Returns array of KeywordOverview.

tools.name: keyword_broad-match
tools.description: Broad Match Keywords. 20 units/line. Phrase-match variants of a seed term. Required: type (default: phrase_fullsearch), phrase. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 3 more). Returns array of KeywordOverview.

tools.name: keyword_difficulty
tools.description: Keyword Difficulty. 50 units/line. KDI (0-100) for one or more keywords. Required: type (default: phrase_kdi), phrase. Optional: database (default: us), export_columns (default: Ph,Kd). Returns array of KeywordDifficulty.

tools.name: keyword_organic-serp
tools.description: Organic Results (SERP) for a keyword. 10 units/line. Top organic ranking URLs for a phrase. Required: type (default: phrase_organic), phrase. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of SERPResult.

tools.name: keyword_overview
tools.description: Keyword Overview (one database). 10 units/line. Single-database volume, CPC, competition, results count. Required: type (default: phrase_this), phrase. Optional: database (default: us), export_columns (default: Ph,Nq,Cp,Co,Nr,Td,In). Returns the KeywordOverview.

params.name: export_columns
params.description: Columns (Ph=phrase, Nq=volume, Cp=CPC, Co=comp, Nr=results, Td=trend, In=intent)

tools.name: keyword_overview-all
tools.description: Keyword Overview (all databases). 10 units/line. ~140 rows covering every regional database. Required: type (default: phrase_all), phrase. Optional: limit (default: 200), offset, export_columns (default: Db,Dt,Ph,Nq,Cp,Co,Nr). Returns array of KeywordOverview.

tools.name: keyword_paid-serp
tools.description: Paid Results (SERP) for a keyword. 20 units/line. Advertisers bidding on the phrase. Required: type (default: phrase_adwords), phrase. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 50), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of SERPResult.

tools.name: keyword_questions
tools.description: Phrase Questions. 40 units/line. Question-form keywords containing a seed phrase. Required: type (default: phrase_questions), phrase. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of KeywordOverview.

tools.name: keyword_related
tools.description: Related Keywords. 40 units/line. Keywords semantically related to a seed phrase. Required: type (default: phrase_related), phrase. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 3 more). Returns array of KeywordOverview.

tools.name: project_create
tools.description: Create a new Semrush project (container) with a name and root domain. Required: name, url. Returns the new Project.

tools.name: project_delete
tools.description: Delete a project. CLI requires --yes to confirm; otherwise dry-runs. Required: project_id. Returns the ProjectDeleteResult. Destructive.

tools.name: project_get
tools.description: Get a single project by ID. Free (no API units). Required: project_id. Returns the Project.

tools.name: project_list
tools.description: List all projects on your account. Free (no API units). Returns array of Project.

tools.name: project_update
tools.description: Update an existing project's name/url. Required: project_id. Optional: name, url. Returns the updated Project.

tools.name: subdomain_organic-keywords
tools.description: Subdomain Organic Search Keywords. 30 units/line. Required: type (default: subdomain_organic), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 3 more). Returns array of DomainOrganicKeyword.

tools.name: subdomain_organic-pages
tools.description: Subdomain Organic Pages. 30 units/line. Required: type (default: subdomain_organic_pages), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainOrganicPage.

tools.name: subdomain_overview
tools.description: Subdomain Overview (one database). 10 units/line. Required: type (default: subdomain_rank), domain. Optional: database (default: us), date, export_columns (default: Dn,Rk,Or,Ot,Oc,Ad,At,Ac). Returns the DomainOverview.

tools.name: subdomain_overview-all
tools.description: Subdomain Overview (all databases). 10 units/line. Required: type (default: subdomain_ranks), domain. Optional: limit (default: 200), offset, date (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainOverview.

tools.name: subdomain_overview-history
tools.description: Subdomain Overview (history). 10 units/line. Monthly historical rankings. Required: type (default: subdomain_rank_history), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 24), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainRankHistoryRow.

tools.name: subdomain_paid-keywords
tools.description: Subdomain Paid Search Keywords. 30 units/line. Required: type (default: subdomain_adwords), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of DomainPaidKeyword.

tools.name: subfolder_organic-keywords
tools.description: Subfolder Organic Search Keywords. 30 units/line. Required: type (default: subfolder_organic), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 3 more). Returns array of DomainOrganicKeyword.

tools.name: subfolder_organic-pages
tools.description: Subfolder Organic Pages. 30 units/line. Required: type (default: subfolder_organic_pages), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainOrganicPage.

tools.name: subfolder_organic-pages-unique
tools.description: Subfolder Organic Pages (unique). 30 units/line. Unique top organic landing pages within a subfolder. Required: type (default: subfolder_organic_unique), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainOrganicPage.

tools.name: subfolder_overview
tools.description: Subfolder Overview (one database). 10 units/line. Required: type (default: subfolder_rank), domain. Optional: database (default: us), date, export_columns (default: Dn,Rk,Or,Ot,Oc,Ad,At,Ac). Returns the DomainOverview.

tools.name: subfolder_overview-all
tools.description: Subfolder Overview (all databases). 10 units/line. Required: type (default: subfolder_ranks), domain. Optional: limit (default: 200), offset, export_columns (default: Db,Dn,Rk,Or,Ot,Oc,Ad,At,Ac). Returns array of DomainOverview.

tools.name: subfolder_overview-history
tools.description: Subfolder Overview (history). 10 units/line. Monthly historical rankings. Required: type (default: subfolder_rank_history), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 24), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainRankHistoryRow.

tools.name: subfolder_paid-keywords
tools.description: Subfolder Paid Search Keywords. 30 units/line. Required: type (default: subfolder_adwords), domain. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of DomainPaidKeyword.

tools.name: tracking_campaigns
tools.description: List Position Tracking campaigns under a project. Use this to find the campaign_id. Required: project_id. Returns the TrackingCampaignList.

tools.name: tracking_competitors-add
tools.description: Add competitors to an existing Position Tracking campaign. Required: campaign_id, competitors. Returns the updated TrackingOperationResult.

tools.name: tracking_competitors-remove
tools.description: Remove competitors from an existing Position Tracking campaign. Required: campaign_id, competitors. Returns the TrackingOperationResult. Destructive.

tools.name: tracking_create
tools.description: Create a Position Tracking campaign on a project. Required: project_id, url. Optional: location, location_id, device (default: desktop) (plus 4 more). Returns the new TrackingCampaign.

params.name: location
params.description: Geo target (use 'tracking location-search' to find the location_id)

tools.name: tracking_dates
tools.description: Available snapshot dates for a tracking campaign (used by --snapshot flag elsewhere). Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_campaign_dates), action (default: report). Returns array of TrackingDate.

tools.name: tracking_emails-disable
tools.description: Disable weekly status emails for a Position Tracking campaign. Required: campaign_id. Returns the TrackingOperationResult. Destructive.

tools.name: tracking_emails-enable
tools.description: Enable weekly status emails for a Position Tracking campaign. Required: campaign_id. Returns the updated TrackingOperationResult.

tools.name: tracking_keywords-add
tools.description: Add keywords to an existing Position Tracking campaign. Required: campaign_id, keywords. Optional: tags. Returns the updated TrackingOperationResult.

params.name: tags
params.description: Comma-separated tags to attach to these keywords

tools.name: tracking_keywords-remove
tools.description: Remove keywords from an existing Position Tracking campaign. Required: campaign_id, keywords. Returns the TrackingOperationResult. Destructive.

tools.name: tracking_location-search
tools.description: Universal location search (returns location IDs for cities/regions/countries). Required: query. Optional: country, limit (default: 20).

tools.name: tracking_organic-competitors
tools.description: Organic competitors discovery (auto-detected competitors ranked across the tracked keyword set). Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_competitors_organic), action (default: report). Optional: main_domain, begin, end (plus 7 more). Returns array of TrackingCompetitor.

params.name: main_domain
params.description: Your main domain (used to anchor the competitor set)

tools.name: tracking_organic-landings
tools.description: Top organic landing pages by tracked-keyword traffic. Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_landing_pages_organic), action (default: report), url. Optional: begin, end, linktype_filter (plus 3 more). Returns array of TrackingLandingPage.

tools.name: tracking_organic-overview
tools.description: Organic overview report (visibility, estimated traffic, average position over a date range). Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_overview_organic), action (default: report), url. Optional: begin, end, linktype_filter. Returns the TrackingOverview.

tools.name: tracking_organic-positions
tools.description: Per-keyword organic positions report. Supports tag filters and competitor comparison. Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_position_organic), action (default: report), url. Optional: begin, end, tags (plus 4 more). Returns array of TrackingPosition.

params.name: url
params.description: Colon-separated list of tracked URL + competitor URL patterns

params.name: tags
params.description: Tag-filter expression (URL-encoded; tag1&!tag2 = include tag1 and exclude tag2)

tools.name: tracking_organic-visibility
tools.description: Organic visibility (Share-of-Voice) index over a date range. Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_visibility_organic), action (default: report), url. Optional: begin, end, linktype_filter. Returns array of TrackingVisibility.

tools.name: tracking_paid-competitors
tools.description: AdWords competitors discovery (auto-detected paid competitors). Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_competitors_adwords), action (default: report). Optional: main_domain, begin, end (plus 6 more). Returns array of TrackingCompetitor.

tools.name: tracking_paid-landings
tools.description: Top paid (AdWords) landing pages by tracked-keyword traffic. Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_landing_pages_adwords), action (default: report), url. Optional: begin, end, linktype_filter (plus 3 more). Returns array of TrackingLandingPage.

tools.name: tracking_paid-overview
tools.description: AdWords overview report (paid visibility, estimated traffic over a date range). Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_overview_adwords), action (default: report), url. Optional: begin, end. Returns the TrackingOverview.

tools.name: tracking_paid-positions
tools.description: Per-keyword paid (AdWords) positions report. Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_position_adwords), action (default: report), url. Optional: begin, end, tags (plus 3 more). Returns array of TrackingPosition.

params.name: url
params.description: Colon-separated list of tracked URL + competitor URL patterns

tools.name: tracking_paid-visibility
tools.description: AdWords visibility (Share-of-Voice) index over a date range. Required: campaign_id, type (default: tracking_visibility_adwords), action (default: report), url. Optional: begin, end. Returns array of TrackingVisibility.

tools.name: tracking_tags-add
tools.description: Add tags to existing keywords in a Position Tracking campaign. Required: campaign_id, keywords, tags. Returns the updated TrackingOperationResult.

tools.name: tracking_tags-remove
tools.description: Remove tags from existing keywords in a Position Tracking campaign. Required: campaign_id, keywords, tags. Returns the TrackingOperationResult. Destructive.

tools.name: url_organic-keywords
tools.description: URL Organic Search Keywords. 30 units/line. Keywords this URL ranks for organically. Required: type (default: url_organic), url. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of DomainOrganicKeyword.

tools.name: url_overview
tools.description: URL Overview (one database). 10 units/line. Required: type (default: url_rank), url. Optional: database (default: us), date, export_columns (default: Or,Ot,Oc,Ad,At,Ac). Returns the DomainOverview.

params.name: export_columns
params.description: Columns (no Dn — URL is the target)

tools.name: url_overview-all
tools.description: URL Overview (all databases). 10 units/line. Required: type (default: url_ranks), url. Optional: limit (default: 200), offset, export_columns (default: Db,Rk,Or,Ot,Oc,Ad,At,Ac). Returns array of DomainOverview.

tools.name: url_overview-history
tools.description: URL Overview (history). 10 units/line. Monthly historical rankings for a URL. Required: type (default: url_rank_history), url. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 24), offset (plus 1 more). Returns array of DomainRankHistoryRow.

tools.name: url_paid-keywords
tools.description: URL Paid Search Keywords. 30 units/line. Keywords this URL has been advertised against. Required: type (default: url_adwords), url. Optional: database (default: us), limit (default: 100), offset (plus 2 more). Returns array of DomainPaidKeyword.
